channel.title: nlin.SI updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: nlin.SI updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Integrable equations with negative evolution numbers
item.description: arXiv:2605.27185v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Two integrable systems are constructed in a 2 + 1-dimensional space. Every of these systems involve two evolutions with negative numbers.
item.dc:creator: Andrei Pogrebkov

item.title: Hybrid Ermakov-Ray-Reid/Painlev\'e II Symmetry Reduction: Application to a Class of Moving Boundary Problems
item.description: arXiv:2605.26939v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Here, a class of nonlinear moving boundary problems for a novel extension of a two-component mKdV system is shown to admit exact solution via application of a hybrid Ermakov-Ray-Reid / Painlev\'e II symmetry ansatz.The mKdV system has its genesis in a reduction of a coupled nonlinear NLS system incorporating deBroglie - Bohm potential terms.
item.dc:creator: Colin Rogers, Adriana C. Briozzo
